_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6-MEK Inhibition in MPNSTs Causes Plasma Cell Infiltration, Sensitization to PD-L1 Blockade, and Tumor Regression.

_contextSnippet: two mice (12%) from the triple treatment group showed complete tumor eradication by histopathologic analyses of excised, CRISPR edited sciatic nerves
details: 12% of mice from triple treatment group showed complete tumor eradication by histopathologic analyses
